---
title: "Pharmaprojects"
page-layout: article
---

# Pharmaprojects

## Description

Pharmaceutical research and development database tracking drugs by company, disease, therapeutic class, and development phase. Supports drug pipeline and biomedical market research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Health & Medicine, Business & Economics, GIS & Spatial Data
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an individual account.

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb2273)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
